User-agent: *
Allow: /
# Block hashed-suffix duplicate blog dirs (auto-generated mirrors).
# Each /blog/<slug>-XXXXXXXX/ already sets rel=canonical pointing to the
# canonical /blog/<slug>/ URL, but blocking crawl prevents wasted crawl
# budget and any chance of duplicate-content penalties.
Disallow: /blog/*-????????/

User-agent: AdsBot-Google
Allow: /
Disallow: /blog/*-????????/

User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /blog/*-????????/

# Internal QA / test pages (also noindex via meta robots)
User-agent: *
Disallow: /test.html

Sitemap: https://kevinarmstrong.io/sitemap.xml
